name: bia-ops
description: BIA OPS - plataforma operativa SaaS para Bia Agency.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @bia-ops/shared && npm run build -w @bia-ops/web && npm run build -w @bia-ops/api
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @bia-ops/web && npm run lint -w @bia-ops/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @bia-ops/shared && npm run typecheck -w @bia-ops/web && npm run typecheck -w @bia-ops/api
